votes.rationale: motion-0028 proves the first governed vertical slice by making execution role explicit at packet creation and by surfacing architect-builder-verifier-operator progress directly in the operator work detail view.
The motion fixes a real semantic mismatch between assignee identity and execution lane role without requiring schema churn. Scope stays narrow and improves correctness of the governed work loop.

Unanimous consent satisfied. This motion makes the vertical slice honest by treating execution role as canonical and assignee as the optional carrier, while preserving operator control and packet-linked SoT continuity.
